---
name: Research Discussion
about: Discuss architecture changes, experimental results, or research directions
title: "[research] "
labels: research-discussion
---

## Topic

What aspect of TRN are you investigating or proposing to change?

## Background

Relevant context, references, or prior work.

## Hypothesis / Proposal

What do you expect to happen, or what change are you proposing?

## Evidence

Include benchmark results, theoretical analysis, or references.
State the model size, step count, device, and seed for any experiments.

## Open Questions

What remains unclear or needs further investigation?
